Archer Airboat Tours — logo concepts

Three directions, site palette & type. All vector. Text not outlined yet — that happens after a winner is picked.

Concept A — Arrow Wake

The Archer pun: an arrow fletched with fan blades, skimming a wake. Primary horizontal lockup + a dedicated app-icon treatment.

Concept B — Fan Cage Badge

Round guide-service badge: prop-cage rays, the arrow, saltwater below. Circle solves every avatar/app-icon job natively.

Concept C — Matlacha Sign-Paint

Hand-painted bait-shop energy: Fraunces italic with SOFT/WONK cranked, the coral finally earning its keep, dolphin over the brush-stroke.
